posts.text:
Absolutely heartbroken to learn about the loss of Illinoisan Jimmy Gracey.
 
My deepest condolences go out to Taras, Therese and his entire family during this time.


ABC 7 Chicago (@ABC7Chicago)

Catalan police say missing American student James Gracey has been found dead in waters off a Barcelona beach.
abc7chicago.com/post/james-g…





— https://nitter.net/ABC7Chicago/status/2034722164381798805#m

Under the SAVE Act, you cannot use your driver's license to register to vote. Republicans want you to buy a passport instead. If you can afford one.

This is a modern-day poll tax.

Trump’s reasoning for this war changes day by day. Hour by hour.

But what doesn’t change is the fact that 13 Americans are dead, costs are skyrocketing and we are all less safe.

Video

Our Veterans, servicemembers and military families know better than anyone the true cost of war.  We’re here in the Capitol with @VoteVets to share how we’re pushing back against Trump’s unjustified war.  Tune in.
 nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1NxaraDpX…

It is egregious that a five-time draft dodger is using our troops as cannon fodder in his illegal war of choice.

Tonight, @SenBooker is calling up his War Powers Resolution to stop these unjustified, unauthorized and deeply unpopular military actions in the Middle East.

This vote should be easy. Every Senator has a Constitutional duty to check this President, safeguard our troops and end this war no one wants.

Heartbroken to learn that Chicago Firefighter Michael Altman died in the line of duty fighting a fire in Rogers Park yesterday. I'm thankful for his courage and sacrifice to keep Chicagoans safe, and my thoughts are with his young child and pregnant wife, loved ones and the entire @CFDmedia community during this incredibly difficult time.

9% of American *citizens* don't have the identification that the SAVE Act requires to vote. Almost 1 in 10.

This is a voter suppression bill.

Absolutely horrific. None of our VA employees should ever have to fear for their safety when they serve our Veterans.

My thoughts are with the victim, their loved ones and everyone else working at the clinic.

The SAVE Act is not about stopping voter fraud. It was designed to serve the fraud in the White House.

Trump knows his policies aren’t popular so he is desperate to stop Americans from having their voices heard.

It’s the “Save Trump’s Ass Act.”

I will vote no.

The Trump Administration: Consumers “are really the least of our concerns right now.”


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Hassett: "If the war were to be extended, it wouldn't really disrupt the US economy very much at all. It would hurt consumers, and we'd have to think about what we'd have to do about that, but that's really the last of our concerns right now."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2033874187874390372#m

The true cost of war. 6 more Americans have been killed while executing their mission during Operation Epic Fury, never to return home to their loved ones.

This loss of life is devastating, and I’m sending my most sincere condolences to their families who pay this tremendous sacrifice to our nation, too.

My thoughts are with the Air Force and the entire military community in the wake of this tragedy. We know they will always answer the call and execute their missions, despite their grief.

Con

Do you consider the more than 23,000 Muslim constituents living in your state right now to be "enemies" too?

What you call being “politically correct” is just being a decent human being.

And not fueling Islamophobic hate and violence against other people.


Coach Tommy Tuberville (@SenTuberville)

I don’t give a rip about being politically correct. 

Innocent Americans are being gunned down in the streets almost daily by Radical Islamists whose ‘religion’ teaches them it’s righteous to kill Ch

Horrified by the attack on Temple Israel in Michigan.

It is unacceptable that another Jewish community is left traumatized by such blatant antisemitism in America.

Everyone should be able to pray in their house of worship without fear.

War is not a f*cking video game.
War is not a f*cking video game.
War is not a f*cking video game.

Seven Americans are dead.


The White House (@WhiteHouse)

UNDEFEATED.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/WhiteHouse/status/2032115039985881556#m

Shrapnel wounds. Brain injuries. Burns.

Trump is throwing our troops into unjustified foreign wars while gutting our VA and making it harder to get the care they earned when they come home.

Video

Absolutely infuriating.

The Iranian missile that Hegseth downplayed as a "squirter getting through" killed six Americans and left dozens with traumatic brain injuries, burns and shrapnel in their bodies.

The true cost of war is so much more than a billion dollars a day. It's paid for in the blood and sacrifices of our troops—who still don't know what the mission is, when it will end or whether their wounds are justified.

We need to put this Administration under oath in a public hearing. Immed

This president never served in uniform—but has no problem using our troops as cannon fodder in a war he cannot justify.

Enough. We need to put them under oath to get the answers our troops deserve.

Video
